View Roadmap
Product Roadmap · 2026
What's Coming to Tenantflow
We're building the features Queensland property managers need most — informed by what the best platforms offer, reimagined with AI-first automation.
12
Features in pipeline
🏦
Trust Accounting
Q2 2026
Coming Soon

Full trust accounting with receipting, bank reconciliation, ABA file export for bulk payments, and automated daily owner disbursements — no separate accounting software needed.

⚡ Currently requires PropertyMe or Xero — bringing it in-house cuts your software costs.
FinanceCompliance
📲
Tenant Portal & App
Q2 2026
Coming Soon

A mobile-friendly portal where tenants submit maintenance requests with photos, view their lease documents, pay rent via PayID, and communicate directly with the property manager.

⚡ Reduces phone calls by ~60%. Tenants get 24/7 self-service; you get a documented trail for every request.
PortalMobile
👔
Owner Portal
Q2 2026
Coming Soon

24/7 owner access to live financials, monthly statements, inspection reports, maintenance jobs, and lease status — with in-app approval for maintenance quotes over a set threshold.

⚡ Owners who can self-serve call 70% less. Approval workflows keep you covered on large repairs.
PortalFinance
✍️
E-Signatures
Q2 2026
Coming Soon

Legally binding digital signatures on Form 18a tenancy agreements, lease renewals, entry condition reports, and special condition addenda — sent and signed from any device.

⚡ No more chasing tenants for wet ink. Average signing time drops from 4 days to 4 hours.
FormsAutomation
📸
Mobile Inspections App
Q3 2026
Q3 2026

iOS & Android app for conducting inspections on-site. Room-by-room notes, photo capture, 360° photos, condition ratings, and tenant digital sign-off — works offline too.

⚡ Complete a full routine inspection report in 15 minutes. Owner-ready PDF sent before you leave the driveway.
MobileInspections
💬
SMS & Bulk Communications
Q3 2026
Q3 2026

One-click SMS or email to all tenants, selected properties, or custom-filtered groups. Scheduled reminders for rent, inspections, and lease renewals sent automatically.

⚡ AI drafts the message, you approve it. Rent day reminders alone reduce arrears by ~15% on average.
CommunicationsAI
💸
Open Banking & PayID Rent
Q3 2026
Q3 2026

Real-time rent receipting via NPP/PayID. Payments are matched to tenants automatically the instant they clear — no manual bank reconciliation, no delays, instant arrears detection.

⚡ Know about a missed rent payment within 60 seconds of the due time — not 3 days later.
FinanceAutomation
🔥
Smoke Alarm & Pool Compliance
Q3 2026
Q3 2026

Track smoke alarm service dates, pool safety certificate expiries, and electrical safety check renewals across your portfolio. Auto-alerts 60/30/7 days before expiry.

⚡ In QLD, a landlord can face fines up to $5,512 for a non-compliant smoke alarm at a property change of tenancy.
ComplianceQLD Law
🧠
AI Lease Review
Q3 2026
Q3 2026

Upload any tenancy agreement and the AI flags non-standard clauses, missing special conditions, unenforceable terms under the RTRA Act, and potential disputes before they happen.

⚡ Catches the "we didn't notice that clause" problem before a tenant does — and before it gets to QCAT.
AIQLD Law
🔗
Xero & MYOB Integration
2027
2027

Two-way sync with Xero and MYOB — management fees, maintenance invoices, and owner disbursements flow into your accounting software automatically, mapped to the correct chart of accounts.

⚡ Eliminates double-entry bookkeeping. BAS preparation time drops from a day to an hour.
FinanceIntegration
🏷️
Vacancy & Prospecting CRM
2027
2027

Applicant pipeline management, tenant reference checks (Equifax/VEDA), REA & Domain listing sync, and a prospecting CRM to grow your rent roll with leads from your network.

⚡ The average vacancy costs an owner $125/day. A tight applicant pipeline is the fastest way to reduce that.
CRMGrowth
📦
Portfolio Migration Tool
Q2 2026
Coming Soon

Bulk import your entire portfolio from PropertyMe, REST Professional, Console Cloud, or Property Tree — properties, tenants, leases, documents, and history migrated in minutes, not weeks.

⚡ "Switching costs" are the #1 reason PMs stay on platforms they've outgrown. We're removing that barrier.
OnboardingMigration
Shape what gets built next
Vote for the features you need most. Early access users lock in 60% off when paid plans launch, and get direct input into the product roadmap.

📋 Arrears Escalation Protocol

Day 1–7
Friendly reminder SMS/email. Log contact attempt.
Day 8
Issue Form 11 — Notice to Remedy Breach. 7-day remedy period.
Day 15
Issue Form 12 — Notice to Leave. 7-day notice to vacate.
Day 22+
QCAT application for termination and/or debt recovery.
1
Expiring in 30 days
2
Expiring in 31–90 days

🚪 Notice of Intention to Leave
RTRA Act 2008 (Qld) — Tenant's Notice
ℹ️ QLD Notice Periods (RTRA Act 2008):
Periodic tenancy: 2 weeks notice
Fixed term — end of term: 14 days notice
Fixed term — early break: Subject to agreement / compensation may apply
